checks.name: Plan 006 mapped tests
checks.evidence: run_mapped.py plan-006-tests now executes the Plan 006 behavior tests and passes with 54 tests after adversarial hardening.

checks.name: Repeated blocker recheck
checks.evidence: Historical blocker recheck preserved from stack setup. User subsequently authorized best-effort Plan 006-owned implementation before Plan 005 merges; completion remains blocked by Gate 4 and publish binding.

checks.name: Third blocker audit
checks.evidence: Historical blocker audit preserved from stack setup. The current branch is no longer source-empty; it contains Plan 006-owned contract implementation, while final completion still waits on Plan 005/Gate 4 and publish binding.

checks.name: Pre-Gate-4 contract implementation
checks.evidence: Plan 006 pure contracts now validate report.json semantics, demo modes, prior-run fallback labels, report-replay audit-only behavior, metrics provenance, fake-live rejection, statistical overclaim rejection, PublicationAttempt outcomes, trusted publication preflight, idempotency, permission/blocker semantics, and redaction.

checks.name: Report replay CLI
checks.evidence: Plan 006 CLI now validates existing report.json artifacts and writes audit-only report-replay validation artifacts without creating branch, replay, ReleaseProof, publication attempt, or publish evidence.

checks.name: PublicationAttempt validation CLI
checks.evidence: Plan 006 CLI now validates PublicationAttempt artifacts and writes pass/fail validation artifacts without invoking a publish API.

checks.name: Demo preflight
checks.evidence: run_mapped.py demo exits 2 by design before Gate 4 and publish binding, writing artifacts/forkproof/demo/preflight-blockers/plan-006-demo.json instead of claiming an Acceptance Demo Run.

checks.name: Adversarial publication trust-boundary hardening
checks.evidence: Read-only adversarial subagents found forged published outcome, self-attested redaction, incomplete ReleaseProof/preflight identity validation, missing normalized blocker class, and malformed-input artifact gaps. Plan 006 contracts now fail closed using repo-native ReleaseProof validation, require passing gate status for published/blocked outcomes, require normalized blocker classes, reject unredacted secret-like PublicationAttempt content, reject branch-writable publication evidence markers, reject missing trusted-context/publish-binding placeholders for proof-backed outcomes, and write CLI failure artifacts for malformed/non-object JSON.

checks.name: Publication preflight CLI
checks.evidence: Plan 006 CLI now exposes an independently runnable publication-preflight command by ReleaseProof path, target, trusted context, optional publish binding/capability, release candidate, permission denial state, and evidence refs. It writes a validated PublicationAttempt without invoking a publish API, returns nonzero for failed preflight outcomes, and normalizes malformed ReleaseProof input as proof_mismatch evidence.

checks.name: Report status and live-source consistency
checks.evidence: Plan 006 report validation now rejects invalid top-level report status, invalid live_attempt_result values, live-new-witness without a new-witness result, live-no-witness that claims a new Witness, report replay that is not audit-only, and Prior-Run Witness Replay without a bounded live attempt result. Demo Report Replay remains audit-only and preserves the source report discovery mode rather than requiring new replay refs.

checks.name: Demo readiness pack validation
checks.evidence: Plan 006 now validates a digest-checked demo readiness pack for presentation/acceptance modes without probing live systems or reading secrets. The pack requires evidence-backed checks for HUD auth, Modal auth, model gateway auth, network, quota, source trace, ForkPoint, prior Witness, replay entrypoint, ProofSet, ReleaseProof, release candidate, publication attempt or expected block, and local artifact paths. Blocked packs require explicit blocked/expected-block reasons; passing packs cannot include blockers; secret-like content is rejected.

checks.name: Core metrics validation
checks.evidence: Plan 006 report validation now requires the core metrics set: branch_count, clusters, time_to_witness, reward_before, reward_after, control_retention, replay_rate, restore_latency, and setup_avoided. Each metric may be measured with evidence_ref or absent as not-measured/not-applicable with reason, preserving honest pre-Gate-4 reporting.

checks.name: Adversarial report/readiness hardening
checks.evidence: Read-only adversarial review found report overclaim gaps. Plan 006 validators now reject status pass with blocked proof/publication refs, live-new-witness without gate-passing live Witness ref/digest, under-proven prior-run fallback, report replay with live branch refs, and duplicate readiness check names.

checks.name: Publication attempt hardening
checks.evidence: PublicationAttempt validation now requires the integration-publication command key, unique evidence refs, non-empty trust fields, trusted command/evidence refs for proof-backed publication outcomes, and rejects failed outcomes that carry a published environment ref. These checks are covered by behavior tests and do not invoke a publish API.

checks.name: Metrics/readiness hardening
checks.evidence: Report metrics now reject duplicate metric names, and readiness packs marked pass reject not-applicable required checks. These checks are covered by behavior tests and preserve honest no-overclaim semantics before Gate 4.

checks.name: Acceptance budget hardening
checks.evidence: Acceptance reports now require a positive integer accepted_branch_budget with launched_branch_count equal to it, or a non-pass resource_stop_ref. Passing Acceptance reports cannot use resource STOP evidence instead of launching the full accepted branch budget.

checks.name: CLI failure-output redaction
checks.evidence: Plan 006 CLI failure lines now use the same redaction helper as failure artifacts, so token-like values in exception text are redacted from command output as well as JSON evidence.

checks.name: Report shape hardening
checks.evidence: Report validation now rejects empty required ids/refs, malformed command_argv, malformed live_branch_refs, and non-string step evidence refs while preserving honest audit-only report replay empty branch refs.

checks.name: Claim-shape overclaim hardening
checks.evidence: Report claims must be a list of non-empty strings and are normalized plus phrase-scanned before single-run overclaim rejection, so hyphenated/case variants and natural-language phrases such as cost-savings, success rate, reliability, or coverage cannot bypass the Plan 006 reference contract.

checks.name: Presentation timeout hardening
checks.evidence: Presentation reports now require a positive integer presentation budget, and a timeout result must switch to Prior-Run Witness Replay rather than validating as live-no-witness. Mapped demo-presentation-timeout passed with 1 test.

checks.name: Adversarial overclaim hardening
checks.evidence: Read-only adversarial subagents reviewed report/demo semantics, publication trust/idempotency/redaction, and evidence/command wiring. Plan 006 validators now reject pass reports with failed steps, blocked proof/publication refs shown as completed steps, acceptance pass without launched live branches, unrelated fallback labels, forged published attempts without trusted publication evidence, branch-writable/temp publication refs, broader secret formats, and pass readiness packs that still point at blocked/missing artifacts.

checks.name: Rebase adversarial hardening
checks.evidence: Read-only adversarial review after rebasing over Plan 005 head 9c9a60f found two contract gaps. Plan 006 now rejects Acceptance reports whose launched_branch_count does not match unique persisted live_branch_refs, rejects Presentation timeout fallback without persisted live branch refs, and requires proof-backed blocked-with-proof publication attempts to reference the trusted integration-publication command row even when the publish binding itself is missing. Mapped plan-006-tests passes with 54 behavior tests and integration-publication passes with 16 tests.

checks.name: Post-Plan-005 merge preflight refresh
checks.evidence: After rebasing on merged main, Plan 006 demo-preflight now consumes Plan 005 manifest-listed ReleaseProof releaseproof-30e03914472631dd and release candidate releasecandidate-294df1726b8a5ed0, validates candidate identity against the proof, writes a blocked-with-proof PublicationAttempt for missing publish binding, and still refuses to claim a full Acceptance Demo Run.

checks.name: Candidate binding hardening
checks.evidence: Adversarial review found mtime/latest-candidate fallback risk. Plan 006 now resolves ReleaseProof and candidate through Plan 005 manifest artifact refs, rejects missing/mismatched candidates, and PublicationAttempt validation rejects temp or Plan-006-demo candidate refs for proof-backed outcomes.

blockers.reason: Plan 005 is complete and the ReleaseProof/candidate validate, but docs/plans/repo-map/INTERFACES.md still records no repository-bound HUD/environment publish primitive or publisher capability. Plan 006 records blocked-with-proof and does not invoke or invent a publish API.
blockers.next_owner: Bind a Wave-1 trusted publish primitive/capability in the repo map, or keep the proof-backed blocked-with-proof outcome as the honest release display state.

blockers.reason: No Plan 006-owned noninteractive command has launched a fresh full-budget Acceptance Demo Run on this branch and emitted artifacts/forkproof/demo/<invocation_id>/report.json with 13 evidence-backed steps. The current demo command remains a blocker-producing preflight, not a completed Acceptance Demo Run.
blockers.next_owner: Implement or bind the repository-native Plan 006 Acceptance Demo Run orchestration that launches the accepted branch budget and validates a full report.json; until then do not mark Plan 006 complete.
